sessions: Run the test suite and report how many tests pass. Do not change any code.
Find where the CLI decides that an option is required, and add a short comment above that code explaining the rule in your own words.
Add a test that asserts a required option produces a non-zero exit code when it is omitted. Put it in a new file tests/test_required_probe.py.
Run the full suite again. If anything you added fails, fix your own test.
